textByHash.03dabf76693e8b85246fffc7fd9b9691a204924e: Have fun, and go kill some Black Knights for me!
textByHash.049d0aebf2949c9e5fb6fcb19622e0fb9d1107d0: You don't want to be a Temple Knight anymore?
textByHash.067a469e7bd7afef7001a9f087ed4f01277666ee: Well bring it here so that I can authenticate your claim and make you a White Knight!
textByHash.0b73199122dce68cceea3baae572028d740fe2af: Well, keep at it! Falador's future is at stake!
textByHash.0ec2efe8ae7363e2892923b3aa14e0d1b457b8e3: Thank Saradomin, no! We have not had a crisis for many years now!
textByHash.103b6a4440a8541dd83f23e79c9965f0739d67d1: Sir Vyvin can be found in Falador Castle, and he will sell you any equipment appropriate to your reputation level.
textByHash.10dbeecd71535bd58e17cad143ad1dfc6078281e: Look, I am very sorry Player, but if you have no proof of your encounter, I can hardly promote you to be a full White Knight, now can I?
textByHash.16c9d70e6042224265af875c901b7fe4af539fa4: They are called the Temple Knights, and you are to meet Sir Tiffy Cashien in Falador park for testing immediately.
textByHash.17d3f7806b58d38b7dd00958f56addbecf4d6e6a: We have no idea where he might be now... His magic is too powerful for us, I do not know how to stop him...
textByHash.18585b337c84f0783b97a2513f99c025cbe217dc: Thank Saradomin you have come back here!
textByHash.1bb318a8be6a7a8522cb61b154aee4b17055427e: Please, I implore you in the name of all that is holy, assist us in banishing him from our kingdom once more!
textByHash.1c11286a78537c34929fab8f4268a434e9b1a5f3: I am afraid our charter prevents us using espionage in any form, that is the domain of the Temple Knights.
textByHash.1ca7721f67f473bcef91fea190e500dda92b9750: Call me Sir Amik, or liege.
textByHash.1e13124dd939aad3e9f45f9176264d8de9a1d44c: That information is classified. I am forbidden to share it with outsiders.
textByHash.2b3728ea82ba46e423bd06660cb879aea91e55db: History says they are a formidable enemy. Do you have a plan to combat this threat?
textByHash.2c1e13cad2ee9461d431f7914a75dbb734ae5494: You have not heard of the infamous murder-mage? He terrorised these lands many years past, thinking himself above the law with his powerful enchantments, but the White Knights finally managed to bring him to
textByHash.2c2cbd329f57b12cae3217aa9ef1f4eef1c70ce3: Absolutely right. Please accept this reward.
textByHash.2c952f5db7916a2b57a69d3469617ee991222cc0: Subtlety isn't exactly our strong point.
textByHash.2cc8a754fabfa83327ef91bd80fb30c84f5bf88b: We have received word from one of our scouts that the evil Solus Dellagar has returned to Asgarnia!
textByHash.2d51924e9630eef66b054e16eafb41885de86857: Well, I did have something you may be interested in, but I've been given orders not to-
textByHash.2e1268fa699c9384f3847688ea07ead3a2018af7: Sadly we are not as rich as we once were, and there are many White Knights who foolishly lose their combat equipment.
textByHash.31451b9c2de221de06b493e1e3f6c44115acf403: That is entirely correct , but I have no idea where you might have heard that for it is a secret guarded only to members of our order!
textByHash.32495f08af55cdfbc71c55254b4fea4d5f3a8613: I'm sorry, did you say something just then?
textByHash.34b5c4147e9acce51dd8fe9e04ebfff0c487f948: So will you aid us in this fight?
textByHash.373b65faf3168a59530a80ec497fadca655599b6: That is 'Sir Amik' or 'My Liege' – not 'Boss'.
textByHash.393daf12885233c1f7e033ca3d9c0952a1eba6fc: Oh. You don't appear to have any room for the dossier in your inventory. Come back when you do.
textByHash.3d2b5191b59a2c8155f37992682f06fda2062885: Your mission, should you decide to accept it, is to infiltrate their fortress, find out what their secret weapon is, and then sabotage it.
textByHash.3ff543e57b61c7e5be1a077e7fbb33d9160c6381: ... Solus Dellagar is still loose... Please, for the safety of my lands you must find him immediately...
textByHash.42b862485b3d8689442a17a1c7b3ae491748bb89: Hello there. I will be leaving for Varrock soon.
textByHash.45f9a6c89158d273d33ceaf7823b637223d4b520: I did not say that. I did not say that at all. That is against all of our codes of honour.
textByHash.4745ab269717262377f86f32f9874b6b260a79ad: No, I am afraid not. I suggest you go meet Sir Tiffy in Falador Park, he will be expecting you.
textByHash.4965583e290aebd5ae9a8cb39222004de93a8722: Kill an unarmed foe? That is not the way of Saradomin, nor of the White Knights.
textByHash.4d4ee3ad9cdb93d69f77c3bfb19be6ba6505b3b8: As for imprisonment...Solus is a highly dangerous man not just because of his mastery of the magical arts, but for his uncanny resourcefulness.
textByHash.54f098e02163f8f326e634cfe68a87e185805a2f: If I consider you to have done a more than adequate job of this, then I will begin to consider possibly moving your name forwards to becoming a full-fledged member of the Order of the White Knights.
textByHash.605b39f55d93da73ceaf8299ee2bb488ac06396f: I am afraid I cannot authorise you to become a white knight unless under a situation of dire circumstance. Assisting us on a freelance basis will be well worth your time however and you will have my personal gratitude.
textByHash.61d1ff50aa955d0e1aa54f1c44f19eb254b82d53: So what say you Player? Spend five long years of your life doing pointless busywork without pay for me, on the off chance that at some point in the future I may put your name forward as a novice White Knight?
textByHash.62a549bd13136698b08c86f48b6b8f8bb1b09566: Well, I need some spy work doing but it's quite dangerous. It will involve going into the Black Knights' fortress.
textByHash.68b798d622580c77cd2fa35b491d6b8d5157b80a: As you wish, from this day forth you are my Squire!
textByHash.68ffdada00af2b03f104a86b2a4c2aa56feb46dc: Indeed. Boats do not do well against dragonfire.
textByHash.6a00a37318f2ad92b06b4efd085d4adfe70877f0: I am the leader of the White Knights of Falador. Why do you seek my audience?
textByHash.6ae60061b676ace3f72e3e769254e577caa101b9: May honour and glory follow you in every action.
textByHash.7623d3f79e8c844e92d00a327628c763eb6a66c4: As Saradomin has told us, 'a good deed is its own reward'.
textByHash.77714eda2157c45ab2e4b051eb554957fe6cc95c: So what say you ? Fight with honour in the name of the White Knights against the terrible Solus?
textByHash.78d75886a68efd33e690784d1015400786691aec: Well , now that you are a White Knight, I expect you should be out there hunting Black Knights for us!
textByHash.79adec32e38f4192757cf8d2e1d8c2e47886a859: No matured Ale, no other brand, simply an Asgarnian Ale.
textByHash.7ba5a632055841a1667df00888f393684907addd: But they claim to have a powerful new secret weapon.
textByHash.829573d7b4e6c9524ea094475c6beebc1c2a9c1d: However, should you find yourself in combat with him, and there is no other way, then perhaps for him to die would be best for us all.
textByHash.838a096c3947d325a51cd68a76755b61eb3fd8d0: The insane magician who is loose once more upon these lands? Remember?
textByHash.84ee94bfce1631b22ca1503d0b9c3d2020e2c82e: Well, a fine adventurer would be a perfect candidate as a deputy in my eyes, but fortunately this can only be done in a time of crisis, and all is currently well.
textByHash.8ad9d724f2f2573bd5d10f64771d966ece1db13f: I... suppose spy work DOES involve a little hiding in corners.
textByHash.8c33ad4e5d3c0c4eecc9ace6a531c13459ca3187: Now that you are a White Knight I should perhaps explain a little about how our system works.
textByHash.8cea54b89bd9f483ffefc0bf08952a46b1857239: As you wish adventurer, let's say no more about it.
textByHash.8dce067bc3c36e5e44697fe24aa967c61497936c: Yes, we have just received a message from the Black Knights saying they withdraw their demands, which would seem to confirm your story.
textByHash.8e0ae62d54ef783215a2d069adf150026250812f: I cannot bear to think of the troubles he may bring us...
textByHash.906c16f45ae05339ea6bd5f11e6255da0c13833f: I assume you mean all these dragons that have been flying around. Do you know something?
textByHash.90d635314d52fe927a9e6fd5d88a1b060bc5db94: Well, another Asgarnian Ale would be greatly appreciated. And stop calling me Boss.
textByHash.96239bcbd9cbd9d3ab7a9a181ad94230a2bdc61c: Would you like me to put your name forwards to them?
textByHash.9738f7da245ec88e0f718c1f53db531729d7e1cb: Quests, eh? Well, I don't have anything on the go at the moment, but there is an organisation that is always looking for capable adventurers to assist them.
textByHash.9e062a42fb71830c0ac9bf0bcf1fcaf5bfbe46d6: Hello there. What can I do for you?
textByHash.9ea0b1da21683bc180f947db6e8480238b9d2c2f: ...Well anyway, for the fine work you achieved at that incident in the Black Knights Fortress, I would be honoured to accept you as my squire.
textByHash.a0794e70fbf8f6b7213f877ab0e067c00cc299f7: Here's the dossier on the case.
textByHash.a4e2c5d03cf17114d69ac9bcd7a832a0d8ef3a4c: justice and he was permanently exiled.
textByHash.a625e891f9fbf7f05dcbde82bf4325c983b43ede: There is of course also the financial recompense as I said.
textByHash.a6a1e05f7f33d475a6f1f5c5735ba0d6f66eb35b: What is worse, it seems he is in possession of dangerous new magics we are powerless against!
textByHash.a9ef03933005180a1235ec6f162237d1e9df35a9: Nothing tangible, no, but you will be deputized to act as a White Knight, and you will feel a warm glow inside of having done the right thing.
textByHash.ac5505d3a49ee3715b5fdacded04d0e0bb6a481b: By killing Black Knights, you will increase your reputation with us, by killing White Knights we will obviously think less of you.
textByHash.add3816509a6739d72fd18f474189a3b5073e7fc: You have??? Then you must have some proof of your encounter!
textByHash.b03627d421096a4f6cdc9abbd31ca2c62909ea15: Come see me again if you change your mind.
textByHash.b0577cb1c8e572a8ac705f0ff23bab4ca0e80744: A potion of invincibility? That is grave news indeed. If you can sabotage it somehow, you will be very well paid.
textByHash.b27d420916b9244925bb8d75dd7a8cc6421111d7: I haven't the faintest idea. Good Luck!
textByHash.b45d7829359b0bc2c13286f3c27751df0dbc7672: Yes, yes in fact I do. I would like you to bring me an Asgarnian Ale.
textByHash.b919798ba967bd9ba6d96778cd7b29cb41aebd0e: But you are wearing their armour!
textByHash.b9260ee7d3d99571c51256af50990c763f560dac: It is a tragedy to hear you speak so, but we must trust in our valour and the wisdom of Saradomin to protect us from this evil man if we can not enlist help against him.
textByHash.bd8e1943503eddcded17d7926e9919eb1ea2b41b: Very well, I shall head to Varrock. Thank you for passing on this message.
textByHash.c4a937e4bf34a822de912ae6b59ee2b14beb2313: Erm, well, this is a little embarrassing, I already HAVE put you forward as a potential member.
textByHash.c4bb9e60e3cc2f989acb90eb1a99053f4bd63696: If we are agreed that the threat is real, may I suggest we get to work on solving it rather than bickering amongst ourselves.
textByHash.c615e6c366a1b948985d57e4f668d87b3a792461: Not as such, no. Unless you consider killing time by running errands fun...?
textByHash.c763c70241660ffdf76145362ba490e41a967867: Well, I did have something you may have been interested in, but I've been given orders not to approach you for trivial matters now that you are a member of the Temple Knights.
textByHash.cb8508a8694a88d9718613b875412417a345aee1: To tell you the truth, I fear that I would be unable to guarantee his captivity in any holding cell belonging to us...
textByHash.ccd70700ab0d7957be15cbfadcd6426f4a420833: Why, you will help keep Asgarnia free of malicious influence, and perform a good deed in the name of King Vallance and of the White Knights!
textByHash.cd3203191cfe5da3f577805f0a49edba43370890: Now, NORMALLY this wouldn't be a problem...
textByHash.d223a0c54e8f15b975b4e5301354953a006f3f83: Very well then; In the name of King Vallance, and for the honour of Saradomin, I now pronounce you a fully deputised White Knight.
textByHash.d344003c32443b908c04f5b59a7545f076c47305: Only to become my Squire. Do you wish to become my squire?
textByHash.d45f391c9e7b17e06f6bb7c612e2604d2ed1d04b: Well that's good. Don't get too overconfident though.
textByHash.d4ad8192fc49e995c578d8169d9c3a22a26fb6c9: Good luck! Let me know how you get on. Here's the dossier for the case, I've already given you the details.
textByHash.dc2f1134da272cc0c6193f91e4113dd1d1686ddc: You've come along at just the right time actually. All of my knights are already known to the Black Knights.
textByHash.e2ba982957095a04f541c972661337d35df4f947: I thought all the dragonkin were dead!
textByHash.e34ebb147dc9db3759cc62d657e0db0eca746f3a: Well hand it over then, and let's see it!
textByHash.e5f711aa49f88843afc869bbd7ef81db1af5ae75: You will spend the next five years of your life running various errands for me.
textByHash.e6434d17c5ea47b38745478c69abc3a5977e49ef: Your excellent work sorting out those Black Knights means I will happily write you a letter of recommendation.
textByHash.ee8107e04f0c37b8e4113682f52f0454bff31d2b: We do not think it fair to make a profit from our brethren, so we will sell you equipment at cost, and rebuy it at the same cost, but we will only sell equipment to those we consider responsible enough to
textByHash.efc076ff5f30e95b9489dd75fe1e43db19a0d65e: I'm not sure I understand... You wish to desert the Temple Knights in favour of my own humble White Knights?
textByHash.f5ca9600d3888fcf3924c4a4d046c8fa1e8f1573: A weapon perhaps, or an item of clothing?
textByHash.f8745b18d78803a4e4c5c7bc5bdf3710567cce27: You are supposed to be looking for Solus Dellagar!
textByHash.f9b67d4a50d66b4227d40244c5add3dfe7d0f995: You can check your White Knight reputation level by looking at your quest journal for the Wanted! Quest, or Sir Vyvin will let you know what level you are at when you go to purchase equipment.
textByHash.fd0100c902a3118bea94ea7b8eb5c26c10af0e19: Well, the Black Knights have started making strange threats to us; demanding large amounts of money and land, and threatening to invade Falador if we don't pay them.
